title: [MTR4] NYC Subway Signage
description: This resource pack adds NYC Subway signage to Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This resource pack adds New York City Subway sign tiles to Minecraft Transit Railway 4.

Full list of icons:
- MTA logo (white)
- MTA logo (blue)
- Exit sign (left)
- Exit sign (right)
- 1 train
- 2 train
- 3 train
- 4 train
- 5 train
- 6 train
- 6 express train
- 7 train
- 7 express train
- A train
- C train
- E train
- H train
- B train
- D train
- F train
- F express train
- M train
- M train (brown)
- V train
- G train
- L train
- T train
- J train
- Z train
- N train
- Q train
- R train
- W train
- 42nd St Shuttle (S)
- Rockaway Park Shuttle (S<sup>R</sup>)
- Franklin Av Shuttle (S<sup>F</sup>)
- Staten Island Railway

## Future plans
### v1.1
- Add SIR express icon
- Change icons to official ones
